  "findings": [
    "Proposed installation shortcut lacks required product listing documentation and project note verification.",
    "Potential violation of NEC 110.3(B) regarding installation in accordance with instructions included in the listing.",
    "Risk of violating NEC 408 panelboard requirements and NEC 200.4 neutral conductor grouping rules if shortcut is executed without verification."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the shortcut installation immediately.",
    "Request the missing product listing page and relevant project notes from the engineering team or manufacturer.",
    "Verify compliance with NEC 110.26 working clearances and NEC 200.4 neutral grouping before proceeding with makeup."
  ],
  "rationale": "A shortcut cannot be approved without the missing submittal documentation (product listing page and project notes) required to verify compliance with NEC Articles 110.3(B), 408, and 200.4. Proceeding without this documentation is non-compliant.",

    "NEC Article 408",
    "NEC Section 110.26",
    "NEC Section 200.4",
    "NEC Section 110.3(B)"
  ]
}
